purpose: Catch fixed scene metaphors that present a place as a stock metaphor of stacked image nouns.
rejectIf: sentence includes concrete damage, history, measurement, or source detail
positiveExamples: The south pier was a graveyard of shadows and salt spray.
negativeExamples: The south pier was a graveyard after the storm destroyed twelve boats.
notes: The frame is intentionally narrow: place plus was a metaphor noun of two image nouns.
